name: ptx_emulation_core
description: Fallback dataflow resource for PTX/TMatmul operations not implemented by GEMM, ternary matmul, rowwise math, CXL DMA, or completion queue hardware.

execution_model.command: The CIRCT node carries cmd_valid, token_in, vector operands va/vb/vy, and an emulation opcode in ddr.
execution_model.service: The CXL runtime may service the node on CPU against coherent CXL-visible memory, update the affected vector/output state, then release token_out.
execution_model.ordering: The emulation node is in the same token chain as hardware resources, so following hardware nodes observe the CPU-emulated writeback.

operands.vb: source vector B or duplicated source for unary ops
